failedAssertions.reason: Cannot verify localStorage persistence from evidence - need browser DevTools inspection. Games display UI score stats but localStorage verification required.
Dashboard shows 'No Mastery Data Yet' even after playing games. Game results are NOT reflected on mastery dashboard at /#/progress - game-to-dashboard integration is broken.

notes.registerRally: Register Rally matching interface functional with 8 registers and descriptions
notes.flagFrenzy: Flag Frenzy prediction game functional with scenario display and flag selection UI
